title: Hoggan Limited Summons at opponent battle start

card.rawText: At the beginning of your opponent's battle, play this card from your hand as a Limited Summon. Your opponent must battle this card in place of your primary creature. This card can be damaged as a Limited Summon. Send this card to your cemetery after battle.

effect.value: At the beginning of your opponent's battle, play this card from your hand as a Limited Summon. Your opponent must battle this card in place of your primary creature. This card can be damaged as a Limited Summon. Send this card to your cemetery after battle.
